name: Blue Ribbon Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 medium baking apples, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, 2 cups sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together eggs, oil, orange juice, and vanilla extract until well mixed.
3. Toss the apples with cinnamon and the remaining sugar in a separate bowl.
4. Pour one-third of the batter into a greased 10-inch tube pan.
5. Spread half of the apple slices on top of the batter.
6. Repeat layers with more batter and apples.
7. Carefully spread the remaining batter over the apples.
8. Bake at 350°F for 55-65 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
9. Allow cooling in the pan for 15 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
10. Dust with powdered sugar.
